name: AdaptivePI-7-v2
description: Adaptive PI: every 6 for k<m, every 7 for k>=m with large m. Verified best configuration.
author: GLM-5
result: Score 35.33 vs previous best 34.72 (LazyPI-Rot6). Key improvement: adaptive PI frequency - use PI every 6 for k<m case (with rotation), and PI every 7 for k>=m case (without rotation). The k<m case benefits from more frequent PI because rotation only maintains top-k columns. The k>=m case can use less frequent PI because the matrix is fully updated each step and PI covers all columns. This asymmetric optimization reduces time (8.30ms vs 8.53ms) while maintaining EV (0.961 vs 0.960).
